# Definitions And Abbreviations
| Term | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| VPP | Virtual Power Plant. |
| NBI | Northbound |
| API | Application Programming Interface. |
| systemId | The unique code representing the power station. |
| onboard | System is registered with the cloud management, allowing vendors to receive system information and control system by issuing commands. |
| offboard | System is disassociated from cloud management, vendors will be unable to control the system. |
| PV  | Photovoltaic. |
| snCode | Serial number code. |
| system | A storage system composed of inverters, batteries, gateways, and other physical components. |
| MQTT | Message Queuing Telemetry Transport |
